title: Membership
meta_description: Community & flexible memberships for founders, investors, and operators. Day passes, Flex+ membership, team suites, and virtual office at Chicago's Civic Opera Building.

data.heading: The room where Chicago's next big thing gets started.
data.sub: Community & flexible memberships for founders, investors, and operators who know that proximity is the point.

data.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
data.sub: Flexible terms. Activating your access is easy and seamless.

tiers.name: Try the Room — Day Pass
tiers.lede: No commitment. Just come in and see what you've been missing. One-time purchase, no membership required.
features: Full access to all shared workspace
3 kitchens — Big Shoulders Coffee, Bevi, Coca-Cola Freestyle, local beer on tap
Self-bookable call rooms & phone booths
Fast + secure Wi-Fi
Wellness and parent rooms
Discounts on Creator/Podcast Studio access
tiers.fine: Quick checkout — card details only. No account setup or recurring membership required.

tiers.name: Flex+ Membership
tiers.lede: Community access, shared workspaces, business address, and a place that puts you in the room. Mon–Fri, 9AM–5PM access.
features: Self-bookable huddle rooms & phone booths
3 full kitchens + local beer on tap
Online community access + member network
Business mailing address — Civic Opera Building
Secure mailroom handling
Steps from Union Station, Ogilvie (OTC) & CTA
Discounted member-pricing for select event spaces & board rooms
Full ecosystem event & community programming — networking events, founder dinners, investor salons, growth labs, and more

tiers.name: Team Memberships & Private Office Suites
tiers.lede: For teams who need more than a desk — a dedicated homebase in the ecosystem. Team memberships start at 3+ members; private offices by request, capacity limited.
features: All Flex+ Membership benefits… and more
Flexible team membership pricing (3+ members)
Discounted member-pricing for all event & meeting room space
Tools and tech-stack perks — software, cloud & partner discounts
Creator Studio access (podcast & editing suite)
Dedicated offices & short-term leases available, pending availability

tiers.name: Virtual Office — Business Address
tiers.lede: Need a Chicago address without the desk? Business mailing address + secure mailroom at the Civic Opera Building — fully remote-friendly. Includes 1 FlexDay pass per month.
features: Prestigious Civic Opera Building business address
Secure mailroom handling & forwarding
1 FlexDay pass per month
Online community access

data.heading: You can't schedule serendipity. You can only put yourself in its path.
data.body: TechNexus community membership gives you access to what exists today — and a stake in what the Chicago venture ecosystem becomes.
